==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water AD|ja|2992年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2992|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2992 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|1852 AD#Birth|ja|1852nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1912 AD#Birth|ja|1912nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1972 AD#Birth|ja|1972nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904972]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Rat|kanji=壬子|romaji=mizunoe nezumi|onyomi=jinshi|p=rénzǐ|w=jen-tzŭ|mi=ʐən³⁵ tsɨ|y=jam4 zi2|j=jam4 zi2|ci=jɐm tsi|mc=ɲiɪm tsi|oc-bs=ɲɨm tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: jinshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου ==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: jinshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: jinshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|1852 AD#Birth|ja|1852nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1912 AD#Birth|ja|1912nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1972 AD#Birth|ja|1972nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου ==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|1852 AD#Birth|ja|1852nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1912 AD#Birth|ja|1912nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1972 AD#Birth|ja|1972nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904972]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Rat|kanji=壬子|romaji=mizunoe nezumi|onyomi=jinshi|p=rénzǐ|w=jen-tzŭ|mi=ʐən³⁵ tsɨ|y=jam4 zi2|j=jam4 zi2|ci=jɐm tsi|mc=ɲiɪm tsi|oc-bs=ɲɨm tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: jinshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý
<!-- == * Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえね (mizunoe-ne) ***Onyomi: じんかのね (jinka-no-ne) ***Onyomi: じんし (jinshi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imja ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý
--> ==Years of Yang Water Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 52 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s years table''' |- ! '''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: jinshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

--> ==Years of Yang Water Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 52 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|1852 AD#Birth|ja|1852nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1912 AD#Birth|ja|1912nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1972 AD#Birth|ja|1972nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese ==Months of Yang Water Rat== Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, [[:en:Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."
However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[:en:1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[:en:Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[:en:1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[:en:1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.
==Days of Yang Water Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days== ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|1852 AD#Birth|ja|1852nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1912 AD#Birth|ja|1912nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|1972 AD#Birth|ja|1972nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904972]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Rat|kanji=壬子|romaji=mizunoe nezumi|onyomi=jinshi|p=rénzǐ|w=jen-tzŭ|mi=ʐən³⁵ tsɨ|y=jam4 zi2|j=jam4 zi2|ci=jɐm tsi|mc=ɲiɪm tsi|oc-bs=ɲɨm tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[:en:Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Rat (壬子) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: jinshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý
